stemHtml: You’re at the gate, prepared for departure, with 30 minutes of discretionary fuel onboard. ATC then advises that due to a runway closure, taxi time will be increased by 15 minutes. What is the appropriate course of action in this situation?

options.a: You can use discretionary fuel for the taxi and depart.
options.b: You cannot depart and need to add more taxi fuel.
options.c: You cannot depart because the contingency fuel is not enough to compensate for the taxi delay.
options.d: You may proceed without any further fuel consideration, regardless of the taxi delay.
